title: Delta Energy Faces Questions Over Holding-Company Ownership
body: Houston-based Delta Energy Solutions is facing fresh scrutiny over its corporate-ownership structure. Public filings show that Delta Energy is 51% owned by Iron Mountain Holdings, a Delaware-based holding company. According to subsequent filings, Iron Mountain Holdings is itself 60% owned by Petrov Holdings, the Russian conglomerate added to the US sanctions list in 2022. Compliance attorneys note that this two-step ownership chain may trigger the OFAC 50% rule, under which any entity owned 50% or more, directly or indirectly, by sanctioned persons is itself blocked. Delta Energy did not respond to a request for comment.
